title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Selebi-phikwe Town Council (cemetery) Bye-laws
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Selebi-phikwe Town Council (cemetery) Bye-laws

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Bye-laws may be cited as the Selebi-Phikwe Town Council (Cemetery) Bye-laws*.
*Originally made under the Township Act now repealed, these regulations have been continued under s 94(2) of the Local Government Act, 2013.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Establishment of cemeteries
provisions.content:
3. Establishment of cemeteries
The areas of land defined in the First Schedule are established as cemeteries for the purposes of these Bye-laws.

provisions.title: Burial in cemetery
provisions.content:
4. Burial in cemetery
No person shall bury or cause to be buried any body elsewhere within the council area than in a cemetery.

definitions.definition: a person other than a child
any person so designated by the council
a cemetery established under the provision of bye-law 3
a person under the age of 10 years
any gravestone, monument, cenotaph, tablet or monumental inscription and any work ancillary thereto.
